testcase.name: test_3_throttle_kicks_in_after_10_failures
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_login_throttle_fix.py:77: in test_3_throttle_kicks_in_after_10_failures assert statuses[10] == 429, f"11th should be 429, got {statuses[10]} — full: {statuses}" E AssertionError: 11th should be 429, got 400 — full: [400, 400, 400, 400, 400, 400, 400, 400, 400, 400, 400] E assert 400 == 429

testcase.name: test_4_throttle_isolated_per_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_login_throttle_fix.py:89: in test_4_throttle_isolated_per_email assert r.status_code == 429 E assert 400 == 429 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_5_admin_unlock_single_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_login_throttle_fix.py:102: in test_5_admin_unlock_single_email assert r.status_code == 429 E assert 400 == 429 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
